column2: only 3 verifiable POIs (Administracao Municipal, Estacao Ferroviaria, Instituto Superior Politecnico); Places returns no usable shopping-dining or outdoors POI for Caala and none could be named with confidence

3 of 4 images uploaded (anchor/outdoors/culture); shopping-dining ungeneratable: all Places photos for New Market, Ranir Bazar, Monoharpur Bazar, Chawk Bazar, Sattar Khan Complex were interiors/night/crowds/watermarks, and text-only generations for Kandirpar and New Market hallucinated non-existent landmarks (rejected as wrong place)
